title: knautia integrifolia var. hybrida
intro: Knautia integrifolia var. hybrida, also known as the red clover or melilot, is a plant species within the family Rosaceae, typically used as a medicinal herb. It is valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and saponins content. The plant has been traditionally used to support women's health, particularly in the treatment of menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Knautia integrifolia var. hybrida can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to aid digestion and promote overall well-being.
